creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
Running 10.x with a kernel with IPv6 disabled, nmap does not work:

> # nmap -sP -PI 10.1.2.0/24
> 
> Starting Nmap 6.47 ( http://nmap.org ) at 2015-07-15 12:58 CEST
> route_dst_generic: Failed to obtain system routes: getsysroutes_dnet: sysroutes_dnet_find_interfaces() failed



It does not matter whether port's "IPV6" option is enabled or not.
9.x and kernels with "options INET6" are not affected.
